error.description: Contains an explanation of the status_code as defined in HTTP/1.1 standard (RFC 7231)

message.description: A human-readable message providing more details about the error.

anyOf.example: Failed to retrieve Widget tokenUrl from 'components.securitySchemes.OAuth2.flows'

detail.description: Contains parameter or domain specific information related to the error and why it occurred.

ref.description: Link to documentation of error type
